message:
refactor(test): move NoopWaker to module scope for clarity

Restructure repro_race_leak.rs test:
- Move NoopWaker struct and Wake impl outside the test function
- Clean up formatting with rustfmt-style line wrapping
- Improve readability of spawn() and task record access chains
- No functional changes, purely structural cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
